name: pp-database-manager

metadata.name: pp-database-manager
metadata.summary: A database manager for Supabase and PocketBase

documentation: This is an package for an Private Project For an School

classes.name: database_manager.leaderboard.StudentRankings

methods.name: database_manager.leaderboard.StudentRankings.__init__
documentation: Initialize the database connections and load environment variables.

methods.name: database_manager.leaderboard.StudentRankings.fetch_student_rankings
documentation:
Fetch student rankings sorted by scores in descending order from a specific grade.

Args:
    grade (str): Grade/table name to query

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary with student names as keys and their scores as values

methods.name: database_manager.leaderboard.StudentRankings.get_specific_student_rank
documentation:
Get a specific student's ranking and details within their grade.

Args:
    table_name (str): Name of the table to query
    grade (str): Grade of the student
    student_name (str): Name of the student to look up

Returns:
    Optional[Dict]: Dictionary containing student's rank and details, or None if not found

methods.name: database_manager.leaderboard.StudentRankings.get_top_students_across_grades
documentation:
Get top students across multiple grades.

Args:
    grades (List[str]): List of grades to query
    top_n_per_grade (int): Number of top students to get from each grade
    final_top_n (int): Final number of top students to return overall

Returns:
    List[Dict]: List of dictionaries containing student info sorted by currency
A class to handle student rankings across different databases and grades.

classes.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.__init__
documentation: Initialize the database connections and load environment variables.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager._auth
documentation: Authenticate with PocketBase using admin credentials.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.fetch_all_students
documentation:
Fetch all student names for a specific grade from Supabase.

Args:
    grade (str): The grade (table name) to fetch data from.

Returns:
    List[str]: List of student names.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.teachers_auth
documentation:
Fetch all student names for a specific grade from Supabase.

Args:
    grade (str): The grade (table name) to fetch data from.

Returns:
    List[str]: List of student names.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.fetch_grade_data
documentation:
Fetch and cache complete student data for a specific grade.

Args:
    grade (str): The grade to fetch data for.

Returns:
    List[Dict[str, Any]]: List of student data dictionaries.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.check_existence
documentation:
Check if a student exists in the specified grade.

Args:
    student_name (str): Student name to check.
    grade (str): Grade to search in.

Returns:
    bool: True if student exists, False otherwise.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.fetch_currency
documentation:
Fetch the currency value for a student.

Args:
    student_name (str): Student name.
    grade (str): Grade to search in.

Returns:
    Optional[int]: Currency value or None if not found.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.update_score
documentation:
Update a student's score.

Args:
    student_name (str): Student name.
    grade (str): Student's grade.
    new_score (int): New score value.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.upload_comment
documentation:
Upload a comment to PocketBase.

Args:
    student_name (str): Student name.
    teacher_name (str): Teacher name.
    points_changed (int): Points changed.
    comment (str): Comment text.
    grade (str): Student's grade.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.fetch_comments
documentation:
Fetch comments for a student.

Args:
    student_name (str): Student name.
    limit (int): Maximum number of comments to fetch.

Returns:
    str: JSON string containing comments data.

methods.name: database_manager.manager.DatabaseManager.fetch_comments_count
documentation:
Fetch the count of comments for a student.

Args:
    student_name (str): Student name.

Returns:
    int: Number of comments.
A class to manage student data across Supabase and PocketBase databases.
